# Personal Data Protection Act

Jurisdiction: Taiwan
Region: TW
Citation: Personal Data Protection Act
Authority: Preparatory Office of Personal Data Protection Commission
Source URL: https://law.pdpc.gov.tw/EngLawContent.aspx?id=5&lan=E
Topics: lawful_basis, notice_transparency, sensitive_data, data_subject_rights, third_party_sharing, cross_border_transfer, security_breach
Keywords: Taiwan PDPA, Personal Data Protection Act, specific purpose

## Summary
Taiwan's personal data protection law governing collection, processing, use, international transfer restrictions, rights, and security.

## Key compliance obligations
- Identify specific purpose and legal basis for collection/use.
- Provide notices and rights mechanisms.
- Assess cross-border restrictions and sector-specific controls.
